auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to your Memory Palace
auth.mfaDescription: Open your authenticator app and enter the 6-digit code to continue.

register.title: Build Your Palace
register.subtitle: Create an account to start preserving memories
register.name: Name
register.confirmationSent: We've sent a confirmation link to your email address. Click the link to activate your Memory Palace.
register.afterConfirming: After confirming, you'll be taken to the shared room.
register.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
register.agreeTerms: By creating an account, you agree to our

forgotPassword.title: Reset Password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send a reset link
forgotPassword.resetLinkSent: If an account exists with that email, we've sent a password reset link.

onboarding.welcomeDescription: A beautiful place to preserve your most precious memories — photos, videos, stories — in a space as unique as your life.
onboarding.letsSetUp: Let's set up your palace in just a few steps.
onboarding.nameDescription: This is your personal palace — we'd love to greet you by name.
onboarding.chooseGoal: Choose what matters most to you right now.
onboarding.goalPreserveDesc: Keep a lifetime of moments safe and beautiful
onboarding.goalLegacyDesc: Create something lasting for my children and grandchildren
onboarding.goalShareDesc: Bring loved ones together around shared memories
onboarding.goalOrganizeDesc: Finally put all those photos, videos, and stories in order
onboarding.chooseFirstWing: Choose your first wing to explore
onboarding.wingDescription: Your palace has five wings, each for a different chapter of your life. Which one calls to you first?
onboarding.wingDescriptionShort: Each wing holds a different chapter of your life. Pick one to start — you can explore them all later.
onboarding.readyQuick: We'll take you straight to your first room. Upload a memory and your palace comes alive.
onboarding.readyDescription: Walk through the corridors, open rooms, and begin filling them with the moments that matter most.
onboarding.navigationDescription: Here's how to explore your palace
onboarding.navigationReassurance: There will be a guided tour once you enter!
onboarding.skipOnboarding: Skip and explore on my own
onboarding.styleChoiceTitle: Which historic period inspires you most?
onboarding.styleRomanDesc: A lavish Roman villa with marble atriums and colonnaded gardens
onboarding.styleRenaissanceDesc: A Medici palazzo with frescoed galleries and grand courtyards

palace.wingAtticDesc: Unassigned memories waiting to find their room

settings.profileDescription: Manage your personal information and account settings.
settings.emailReadonlyNote: Your email address is managed through your login credentials and cannot be changed here.
settings.aboutMePlaceholder: A few words about yourself, your family, or what brings you here...
settings.goalDescription: What matters most to you? You can change this anytime.
settings.profileLoadError: Could not load profile. Please try refreshing the page.
settings.accountDescription: Manage your password and account settings.
settings.changePasswordDesc: We will send a password reset link to your email address.
settings.passwordResetSent: Password reset email sent. Check your inbox.
settings.exportDataDesc: Download all your memories, photos, and stories as a ZIP file.
settings.exportDataComingSoon: Data export is coming soon. We are working on it!
settings.exportZipDesc: Download all your data and photos in a single ZIP file
settings.exportZipError: Could not create export. Please try again.
settings.dangerDescription: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
settings.deleteConfirmDescription: This will permanently delete your account, all your memories, photos, and stories. Type DELETE below to confirm.
settings.palaceStyleDesc: Change the historic period of your palace architecture.
settings.palaceStyleUpdated: Palace style updated. Reload to see changes.
settings.downloadMyDataDesc: Download a copy of all your data including profile, memories, and settings. Files (photos, videos) can be downloaded separately from your rooms.
settings.exportFailed: Failed to export data. Please try again.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Choose how and when Memory Palace reminds you about your memories.
notifications.browserUnsupported: Your browser does not support push notifications. Try using Chrome, Edge, or Firefox for the full experience.
notifications.permissionDenied: Notifications are blocked by your browser. To enable them, click the lock icon in your address bar and allow notifications for this site, then refresh the page.
notifications.pushDescription: Receive notifications even when the app is closed
notifications.onThisDayDesc: Daily reminder when you have memory anniversaries
notifications.timeCapsuleDesc: Get notified when a time capsule is ready to open
notifications.weeklyDigestDesc: Receive a weekly email with memory anniversaries, upcoming time capsules, and shared room activity
notifications.infoNote: Push notifications are sent once daily around 9:00 AM. The weekly email digest is sent every Monday morning. Your data is stored securely and only used to deliver the notifications you opt into. You can disable any notification at any time.

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.description: Manage your plan and view your usage.
subscription.nearLimitWarning: You are approaching your free plan limits.
subscription.forMoreSpace: for more space and AI features.
subscription.billingConnectError: Could not connect to billing service.
subscription.paymentConnectError: Could not connect to payment service.

connections.title: Connected Accounts
connections.description: Link your cloud storage and photo services to import memories directly into your palace. Your files remain in their original location — we only copy what you choose to import.
connections.disconnectFailed: Failed to disconnect. Please try again.
connections.privacyNote: Privacy note: Memory Palace only accesses your files when you explicitly choose to import them. We never scan, index, or store your cloud files without your direct action. You can disconnect any service at any time.
connections.googlePhotosDesc: Import photos and videos from your Google Photos library.
connections.dropboxDesc: Browse and import files from your Dropbox storage.
connections.onedriveDesc: Access photos and documents from your Microsoft OneDrive.
connections.boxDesc: Import files from your Box cloud storage.
connections.applePhotosDesc: Export from Apple Photos app, then upload via Mass Import.
connections.appleMacSteps: Open the Photos app on your Mac.|Select the photos you would like to import.|Go to File → Export → Export Unmodified Originals.|Save them to a folder on your computer.|Return to Memory Palace and use the Mass Import panel to upload.
connections.appleIphoneSteps: Open the Photos app on your device.|Tap 'Select' and choose the photos you want.|Tap the Share button and choose 'Save to Files'.|Save them to iCloud Drive or another accessible location.|On your computer, open Memory Palace and use Mass Import to upload.
connections.appleIcloudSteps: Visit icloud.com/photos in your web browser.|Sign in with your Apple ID.|Select the photos you want to import.|Click the download button to save them to your computer.|Return to Memory Palace and use the Mass Import panel to upload.

familySettings.title: Family Sharing
familySettings.description: Create a family group to share your memory palace wings and rooms with loved ones.
familySettings.invitedDescription: You have been invited to join the family group "{name}". Joining will give you access to shared wings and rooms from family members.
familySettings.joinedSuccess: You have joined the family group!
familySettings.createGroupDesc: Start a family group and invite your loved ones. Family members automatically get view access to shared wings and rooms.
familySettings.howItWorksDesc: Family members automatically get view access to wings and rooms you share with the "family" visibility setting. Each member's private memories remain private. Owners and admins can invite or remove members.
familySettings.wingSharingDesc: Share entire wings of your palace with family members
familySettings.inviteToShare: Invite family members to your group above to start sharing wings.

legacySettings.title: Your Legacy
legacySettings.description: Your memories are precious. Here you can decide who will receive access to your palace and what messages your loved ones will find when the time comes.
legacySettings.introCallout: There is no rush. You can return to these settings any time and update them as your wishes evolve. Everything here is private and encrypted until you choose otherwise.
legacySettings.contactsDesc: These are the people who will receive access to your memory palace. You decide exactly how much they can see.
legacySettings.noContactsDesc: When you are ready, add the people you trust most. They will receive access to your memories when the time comes.
legacySettings.accessLevelDesc: How much of your palace will they be able to see?
legacySettings.accessFullDesc: Access to every wing and room
legacySettings.contactAdded: Legacy contact added. Your loved one will be in safe hands.
legacySettings.fillNameEmail: Please fill in both name and email.
legacySettings.messagesDesc: Write letters to the people who matter most. Your words will be delivered to them with care, exactly when you choose.
legacySettings.noMessagesDesc: Take your time. When you are ready, you can write a personal letter that your loved ones will treasure.
legacySettings.subject: Subject
legacySettings.messagePrompt: Write from the heart. There are no rules here, just your words for someone you love.
legacySettings.messageSaved: Your message has been saved. It will be kept safe.
legacySettings.fillRecipientSubject: Please fill in both recipient and subject.
legacySettings.settingsDesc: These settings determine when and how your legacy plan is activated. Everything stays private until the conditions you set are met.
legacySettings.inactivityDesc: If you have not logged in for this many months, your account will be flagged for legacy transfer. Your trusted verifier will then be contacted to confirm.
legacySettings.inactivityRecommendation: We recommend at least 12 months. You can change this at any time.
legacySettings.trustedVerifierDesc: This person will be contacted to confirm that the legacy transfer should proceed. Choose someone you trust deeply -- a partner, a close family member, or a legal representative.
legacySettings.statusSafe: -- your palace is yours, safe and sound.

mfa.title: Two-Factor Authentication
mfa.description: Add an extra layer of security to your account. When enabled, you will need to enter a code from your authenticator app each time you sign in.
mfa.accountProtected: Your account is protected with two-factor authentication.
mfa.disableConfirmDesc: Disabling two-factor authentication will make your account less secure. You can always re-enable it later.
mfa.step1Desc: Open your authenticator app (such as Google Authenticator, Authy, or 1Password) and scan this QR code.
mfa.cantScan: Can't scan? Enter the key manually
mfa.step2Desc: After scanning, your authenticator app will show a 6-digit code. Enter it below to complete setup.
mfa.invalidCode: Invalid code. Please check your authenticator app and try again.
mfa.completeDesc: Your account is now protected with an additional layer of security. You will need your authenticator app each time you sign in.
mfa.backupWarning: Important: Make sure you have a backup of your authenticator app data. If you lose access to your authenticator, you may be locked out of your account.
mfa.qrCodeAlt: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app

import.title: Import from Cloud
import.browseDescription: Browse and select files from your connected accounts
import.noAccountsDesc: Connect your cloud storage or photo services to import memories.
import.importWaitMessage: Please wait while we download and import your selected files. This may take a moment depending on the file sizes.
import.noFiles: No files found in this location.

room.maxRoomsReached: Maximum {max} rooms reached for this wing
room.deleteConfirm: Delete "{name}"? Memories inside will be lost.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.modeDescription: Makes text and buttons larger for easier reading

hero.headline: Preserve Your Memories for Eternity
hero.description: Build a beautiful 3D palace for your photos, videos, and stories. Walk through your memories in an immersive virtual space — and share them with the people who matter most.

features.title: What makes it special
features.subtitle: More than storage. A living legacy.
features.palace3dDesc: Walk through a breathtaking virtual villa with wings for Family, Travel, Childhood, Career, and Creativity. Your memories displayed as art in an immersive 3D world.
features.aiInterviewsDesc: Our gentle AI interviewer guides you through your life story, asking the right questions to capture memories you might have forgotten. Like talking to a thoughtful friend.
features.cloudImportDesc: Connect Google Photos, Dropbox, OneDrive, or Box and let AI sort thousands of photos into the right rooms — automatically organized with smart titles and dates.
features.timeCapsuleDesc: Seal memories to be revealed on a future date. Leave a birthday message for your grandchild, or a letter to be opened in 2050. The future will thank you.
features.sharingDesc: Invite family members to contribute their own memories to shared rooms. Build your collective story together, across generations and continents.
features.legacyDesc: Designate heirs for your palace. Record video messages, write letters, and ensure your story lives on — preserved with care, for those who matter most.

howItWorks.title: Getting started
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps
howItWorks.step1Desc: Sign up for free and choose your palace style. Tell us about the chapters of your life — we will create personalized wings and rooms.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Upload photos and videos, record stories, or import directly from Google Photos or Dropbox. AI helps organize everything beautifully.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Invite family to explore your palace, contribute their own memories, and experience your life story in immersive 3D.

preview.title: See it in action
preview.subtitle: A glimpse inside your palace
preview.description: Imagine walking through elegant rooms where every photo, video, and story has its place — beautifully displayed in 3D.
preview.exteriorDesc: Your palace, nestled in a serene landscape
preview.corridorDesc: Walk through themed wings of your life
preview.roomDesc: Memories displayed as art on the walls
preview.uploadDesc: Drag, drop, or import from cloud services

audience.title: Who it's for
audience.subtitle: Built for those who care about legacy
audience.keepersDesc: Individuals 60+ who want to organize a lifetime of memories into a visualized legacy for future generations.
audience.guardiansDesc: Parents and grandparents who want to ensure their stories, messages, and memories live on — no matter what.
audience.archivistsDesc: Anyone drowning in 50,000 photos across devices who wants AI-powered organization in a meaningful space.

testimonials.title: What people say
testimonials.subtitle: Stories from our community
testimonials.quote1: After my husband passed, I thought those memories would fade. Now I walk through our palace together with my grandchildren, and it feels like he is still here with us.
testimonials.quote2: I recorded messages for each of my children to receive on their wedding day. Knowing those words are safe, sealed, and waiting — that gives me real peace.
testimonials.quote3: My mother has dementia, but together we built her palace from old photo albums. On good days, walking through the rooms brings back stories I had never heard before.
testimonials.quote4: We imported 15,000 family photos from three decades. The AI sorted everything in under an hour. It would have taken me months.

cta.title: Ready to preserve your legacy?
cta.description: Start for free. No credit card required. Your memories are waiting for a home.

footer.about: We believe every life story deserves to be preserved with beauty and dignity. The Memory Palace transforms your photos, videos, and stories into an immersive 3D experience that your family can treasure forever.
footer.copyright: The Memory Palace. Preserve your memories for eternity.

walkthrough.phase0: Welcome to your Memory Palace, {name}. Click the entrance to step inside.
walkthrough.phase0Mobile: Welcome to your Memory Palace, {name}. Tap the entrance to step inside.
walkthrough.phase1: This grand hall connects five wings of your life — each one a gallery for a different chapter.
walkthrough.phase2Desktop: Use arrow keys or WASD to walk. Drag to look around. Walk to the {wingName} door and step through.
walkthrough.phase2Mobile: Use the joystick to walk. Swipe to look around. Walk to the {wingName} door and tap it.
walkthrough.phase3: Welcome to your {wingName} wing. Each door leads to a room. Walk to {roomName} and enter.
walkthrough.phase4: This is {roomName}. Let's bring it to life with your first memory.

discovery.title: Your Palace is Alive
discovery.subtitle: Here's what you can do next
discovery.massImportDesc: Bring in hundreds of photos at once
discovery.lifeInterviewsDesc: AI captures your stories through conversation
discovery.timeCapsuleDesc: Seal a room to open on a future date
discovery.shareFamilyDesc: Invite loved ones to view or contribute
discovery.tracksAchievementsDesc: Follow guided tracks and earn points

familyTree.title: Family Tree
familyTree.emptyDescription: Add family members and connect them with relationships to build your genealogy tree. You can also import an existing GEDCOM file.

pricing.title: The Memory Palace
pricing.headline: Simple, Honest Pricing
pricing.description: Start free. Upgrade when you need more space for your memories. All paid plans include a 14-day free trial.
pricing.faq1a: Absolutely. No lock-in, no penalties. Cancel from your account settings and keep access until the end of your billing period.
pricing.faq2q: What happens to my memories if I downgrade?
pricing.faq2a: Your memories are never deleted. You will just not be able to add new ones until you are within the free plan limits.
pricing.faq3a: Yes. All data is stored on EU-hosted infrastructure with encryption at rest and in transit. We are fully GDPR compliant.
pricing.faq4a: The Guardian plan includes family sharing, allowing up to 5 family members to contribute to your palace.
pricing.copyright: The Memory Palace. Preserve your memories for eternity.
pricing.somethingWentWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.
pricing.couldNotConnect: Could not connect to payment service. Please try again.

cookieConsent.message: We use cookies to improve your experience and analyze usage.
cookieConsent.essentialDesc: Required for authentication and core functionality.
cookieConsent.analyticsDesc: Help us understand usage patterns via PostHog (anonymized).

notificationPrompt.title: Stay connected to your memories
notificationPrompt.description: Get gentle reminders for "On This Day" anniversaries and time capsule reveals.

pwa.title: The Memory Palace
pwa.installMessage: Install as app on your phone
pwa.iosStep1: 1. Tap the Share button at the bottom
pwa.iosStep2: 2. Scroll down and tap "Add to Home Screen"
pwa.androidStep2: 2. Tap "Install app" or "Add to Home Screen"

offlineBanner.message: You're offline — changes will sync when reconnected

offline.title: Your palace is resting…
offline.message: It seems you've wandered beyond the reach of the network.
offline.reassurance: Don't worry — your memories are safe and will sync when you reconnect.

invite.wantsToShare: {name} wants to share memories with you

legacyView.linkNotFoundDesc: This legacy link is invalid or has already been used. If you believe this is an error, please contact the person who shared it with you.
legacyView.linkExpiredDesc: This legacy access link has expired. Access links are valid for 90 days after delivery.
legacyView.greeting: Dear {contact}, {sender} wanted you to have these memories.
legacyView.noMemories: No shared memories are available at this time.

interview.noWordsDetected: We didn't catch any words. You can type your answer below, or try recording again.
interview.encouragement1: Take your time. There are no wrong answers.
interview.encouragement2: This is your story, told in your own words.
interview.styleFactualDesc: Clear, straightforward, close to your words
interview.typeAnswerPlaceholder: Type your answer here... take your time.
interview.storyIntro: Here is a narrative woven from your answers. You can edit it before saving.
interview.leaveConfirm: Are you sure you want to leave? Your progress in this interview will be saved.
interview.storySaved: Your interview on "{title}" has been saved.
interview.giftMessage: These stories are a gift to everyone who comes after you.

sharingPanel.privacyInfo: Your wing is always private. Only this specific room can be shared. Invited people see room contents but cannot access other wings or rooms.

legacyPanel.title: Your Legacy
legacyPanel.subtitle: Ensure your memories live on for those you love
legacyPanel.description: Your legacy contacts are people you trust to receive access to your Memory Palace. If your account becomes inactive, they will be able to visit the parts of your palace you have chosen to share with them.
legacyPanel.noContactsDesc: Add someone you trust to ensure your memories are preserved and passed on to those who matter most.

roomGallery.displaySettingsDesc: Toggle which memories appear as physical objects in the room. Each type has limited furniture slots.
roomGallery.cropSelected: Crop region selected. Drag on image to adjust.
roomGallery.cropInstruction: Click and drag on the image to select crop region.

tracksPanel.description: Complete tracks to earn Memory Points and build your legacy.

gettingStarted.uploadFirstDesc: Add a photo, video, or document to any room
gettingStarted.completeInterviewDesc: Let our AI guide you through your story
gettingStarted.customizeRoomDesc: Change a room's name, icon, or layout
gettingStarted.shareWithSomeoneDesc: Invite a family member to view a room

wingManager.title: Customize Wings
wingManager.description: Rename, change icons, and set accent colors
wingManager.hint: Changes are saved automatically and reflected throughout the palace. Click a wing name to rename, the icon to change it, or the colored circle to pick an accent color.

featureSpotlight.importDesc: Bring in photos from your phone or computer. Upload one by one, or use Mass Import to add entire folders at once.
featureSpotlight.interviewDesc: Our AI interviewer guides you through your life story with thoughtful questions. Just talk — we turn it into memories.
featureSpotlight.capsuleDesc: Fill a room with messages, photos, and videos for someone special. Set it to open on a future date.
featureSpotlight.shareDesc: Invite loved ones to view your rooms or contribute their own memories. Building a palace is better together.
featureSpotlight.skipShowNext: Skip — show me the next one

corridorGallery.title: Corridor Gallery
corridorGallery.description: Customize the paintings on your corridor walls. Choose photos from any wing, or upload your own images.
corridorGallery.noPhotos: No photo memories found. Add photos to your rooms or upload an image.
corridorGallery.hint: Photos assigned here will appear as paintings in the corridor. Click a painting in-scene to enter its room.

memoryMap.title: Memory Map
memoryMap.noLocationsDesc: Add GPS coordinates to your memories to see them on the map

memoryTimeline.title: Memory Timeline

touchControls.desktopHint: Drag to look around · Tap a door to enter
touchControls.mobileHint: Left side: move · Right side: look · Tap memories to view
